---
title: "Home"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.lang-switcher}
<a class="lang-link" href="./">English</a>
<a class="lang-link" href="../es/">Español</a>
:::

::: {.hero-shell}
[]{.eyebrow} Technical case study with product polish

# Pythia { .hero-title }

::: {.hero-subtitle}
Data Science for Cafeterias

Final project for the Master in Data Science at UCM/NTIC.
:::

::: {.badge-row}
::: {.hero-badge}
<strong>Real world project</strong>
<span>Uses real sales and customer review data from a Madrid coffee shop to build a practical, intelligent cafeteria application.</span>
:::
::: {.hero-badge}
<strong>Integrates distinct fields of knowledge</strong>
<span>Effectively combines coursework in ETL, EDA, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Time Series, NLP, and advanced visualization into one coherent solution.</span>
:::
::: {.hero-badge}
<strong>Built as a real product</strong>
<span>Presented as a functioning MVP in Streamlit, with recognitions including the maximum grade and 2nd place in a pitch contest.</span>
:::
:::

::: {.cta-row}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/your-linkedin/){.cta-button .cta-secondary}
[Watch Demo](https://youtu.be/gkD9bKw1ikY){.cta-button .cta-tertiary}
:::
:::

## Why Pythia { .section-title }

Pythia turns a complex data science challenge into a coherent product story. The project combines rigorous methodology, explainable modeling choices, and a polished end-to-end experience so recruiters, professors, and technical evaluators can understand both the business value and the engineering quality in less than three minutes.

::: {.feature-grid}
::: {.content-card}
### Product overview
From concept to interface, Pythia is framed as a usable product rather than only a model notebook.

[Explore the product overview](./product-overview.html)
:::
::: {.content-card}
### Data and methodology
The analytical workflow is documented clearly, from sourcing and preparation to evaluation design.

[Review the methodology](./data-methodology.html)
:::
::: {.content-card}
### Results and impact
Performance is presented together with practical implications, business relevance, and communication quality.

[See the results](./results-impact.html)
:::
:::

## In Three Minutes { .section-title }

::: {.page-grid}
::: {.info-panel}
### What it solves
Pythia addresses a meaningful business problem with a decision-support perspective, translating raw data into insight that can guide action.
:::
::: {.info-panel}
### How it works
The system combines structured data work, sound methodology, and interpretable modeling decisions within a clear product narrative.
:::
::: {.info-panel}
### Why it stands out
It was awarded the maximum grade and placed second in a pitch contest, reflecting both technical depth and strong communication.
:::
:::

## Video Demo { .section-title }

::: {.youtube-frame}
<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/gkD9bKw1ikY" title="Pythia demo video" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
:::

## Supporting References { .section-title }

Your existing technical materials can live alongside the website as supporting evidence rather than driving the homepage design.

::: {.reference-links}
[Repository](https://github.com/your-username/pythia)
[Technical report](https://github.com/your-username/pythia)
[Slides](https://github.com/your-username/pythia)
:::

## Next Stops { .section-title }

::: {.feature-grid}
::: {.content-card}
### Team
Meet the people behind the project and the roles that shaped the final delivery.

[Meet the team](./team.html)
:::
::: {.content-card}
### Awards and recognition
See the academic and presentation achievements that differentiate the project.

[View awards](./awards-recognition.html)
:::
::: {.content-card}
### Contact
Reach out for opportunities, technical discussion, or a deeper walkthrough.

[Open contact page](./contact.html)
:::
:::
